creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=256332

The original subject is definitely in wrong format, but this auto
assignment log looks weird:

  Flags: maintainer-feedback?(ume@FreeBSD.org)
  Assignee: ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org → ume@FreeBSD.org

Maybe the subject line has triggered some unexpected path?
